programme.title: Phoenix Evening Express -28/3/26
programme.desc: PHOENIX EVENING EXPRESS: Phoenix Evening Express reports world events with in-depth coverage of the latest social, economic, cultural and sports news from Mainland China, Taiwan and Hong Kong.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular
programme.desc: Premium Spectacular offers Phoenix's finest documentaries in our weekend prime time slot. Each episode comes relevant to the latest news that hits the headlines. Themes range from hot current affair issues at home and abroad, to diverse topics of social, historical and cultural interests.

programme.title: E466
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: This refreshing cultural program shares with you the wisdom of life, extracting the truth from social events and casting new lights on the high minds of ancient sages.

programme.title: E128
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

programme.title: E164
programme.desc: Phoenix Satellite TV creates a brand-new Greater Bay Area magazine-style column 'GBA Discovery' with a total duration of 26 minutes. Phoenix reporters visited the Greater Bay Area in person and discovered the latest and most interesting events, people, and achievements in the Greater Bay Area. The column is divided into three sections: hotspots in the Bay Area, people in the Bay Area, and coordinates in the Bay Area.

programme.title: E217
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Special column of character record. Through the exquisite length of about 15 minutes in each episode, it tells the stories of Hong Kong people and what happened. For the national Chinese audience, understand the new perspective of Hong Kong.

programme.title: E6 - 舊愛vs新歡？
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E13 - 魔丸額王安宇整蠱沈騰
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: E6 - 舊愛vs新歡？
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E10 - 茜拉王赫野狂熱舞台超燃
programme.desc: 節目煥新升級，打破原有賽制，以「聽世界的聲音，唱我們的歌」為主題，廣邀了劉宇寧、毛不易、馬嘉祺、古巨基、李克勤、騰格爾、龔琳娜等三十多位歌手平行演繹，回歸音樂本質，共同打造融合金曲，為歌手之間的合作與交流提供更多的可能性，打造充滿無限活力的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E4 - 黃曉明再現何以琛
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: Veterinarian-turned-priest Michael, who came to Jeju Island and fell in love with it, now tends to a vast ranch. Nam-gil and Sang-yoon assist Father Michael in caring for the horses.

programme.title: La French Touch
programme.desc: Sebastien Martin and his friend Chef Francois Audrin travel through Kochi Prefecture, visiting local farms and wineries, discovering inspiration from the producers' commitment and unique food culture.

programme.title: E23 - Truffle Eggs With Chips & Chives
programme.desc: Living in Tuscany allows for the enjoyment of a long truffle season. Rachael shows how to use local truffles to add amazing flavour to a decadent dish of scrambled eggs and potato chips.

programme.title: E24 - Celery Root Flan & Roast Sausages
programme.desc: Rachael and her sister Maria team up to show how to make a rustic meal of roasted pork and chicken sausages, tossed with vegetables and grapes.

programme.title: Giving Hope: The Ni'cola Mitchell Story
programme.desc: Ni'Cola Mitchell, successful author, realises at a book signing that her calling is to help disadvantaged girls. She launches Girls Who Brunch, to make young women feel seen and empowered.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Today's featured homes showcase dramatic transformations. First, we have the 'My Modern Journal House,' a home that has shed its outdated appearance and embraced a sleek, modern style.

programme.title: The K-Gim Revolution
programme.desc: From the Korean table to tables around the world, gim is gaining global recognition. What makes gim so compelling? Michelin three-star chef Anh Sung-jae follows the journey of gim as a K-food icon.

programme.title: E6 - Kimberley And Paul
programme.desc: Avid ocean-lovers Kimberley and Paul are moving to the East Coast to retire and live out their seafront dream. But their big dreams come with a lot of water toys that they need to accommodate.

programme.title: Trapped In Her Dorm Room
programme.desc: When a classmate's adoration turns into a dangerous obsession, college student Erin finds herself held captive in her own dorm room during Spring Break.

programme.desc: The XLE4, soon to be the biggest jack-up rig on Earth, will stand on record breaking 200 metre long legs, and will be assembled from 11 gigantic blocks.

programme.title: E3 - The Big Picture - The Imax Experience
programme.desc: Discover the science behind the IMAX Experience and get versed in the mechanics and safety of movie weaponry by a military technical advisor.

programme.title: E6 - The Explorer's Study
programme.desc: Panic rooms take on a whole new meaning in Race To Escape, two teams of three strangers compete in the ultimate test of grace under pressure.

programme.title: Moonbound
programme.desc: To win the prize privately funded team needs to land a rover on the Moon, navigate it for 500 meters and send 'Mooncasts' back to Earth.

programme.title: E3 - The Big Picture - The Imax Experience
programme.desc: Discover the science behind the IMAX Experience and get versed in the mechanics and safety of movie weaponry by a military technical advisor.

programme.title: E1 - Attention Bad Shoppers
programme.desc: Mark Rober and the team exact revenge on inconsiderate shoppers who over-indulge on free samples at a booby-trapped farmers' market stand.

programme.title: E2 - Attack Of The Cell Foes
programme.desc: Mark and the team target rude phone zombies with pranks that exact payback on loud mobile phone talkers and inattentive text walkers.

programme.title: E2 - Huge Hulls
programme.desc: The XLE4, soon to be the biggest jack-up rig on Earth, will stand on record breaking 200 metre long legs, and will be assembled from 11 gigantic blocks.

programme.title: E4 - Dry Season
programme.desc: The dry season is the toughest time of year. With lower water levels and less space, animals need to quickly learn new skills to survive…and if they don’t, predatory vultures will swoop in for a feast.

programme.title: E5 - Jungle Juniors
programme.desc: Every year, more than 200,000 monkeys in Peru are trafficked illegally. Almost all are babies. Watch as these little ones learn to survive without their moms and try to make new friends along the way.

programme.title: E2 - Carnivore Rescue
programme.desc: Deep in Kafue National Park, the largest and wildest protected area in Zambia, a team of biologists and vets from the Zambian Carnivore Programme (ZCP) races against time to save and protect Africa’s apex predators.

programme.title: E4 - Dry Season
programme.desc: The dry season is the toughest time of year. With lower water levels and less space, animals need to quickly learn new skills to survive…and if they don’t, predatory vultures will swoop in for a feast.

programme.title: E5 - Jungle Juniors
programme.desc: Every year, more than 200,000 monkeys in Peru are trafficked illegally. Almost all are babies. Watch as these little ones learn to survive without their moms and try to make new friends along the way.

programme.title: E8 - Southeast Asia
programme.desc: With real-life dueling dragons, giant sumo-wrestling beetles, street-fighting monkeys, and sea turtles that play king of the hill – on top of another sea turtle, Southeast Asia boasts a wide range of wildlife warriors.

programme.title: E8 - Costa Rica - Shark Defenders
programme.desc: The Pacific coast of Costa Rica is a biodiversity hotspot that hosts nearly 5,000 species of marine life. But here in this undersea jungle, the ocean’s top predator is at risk. Discover how marine defenders are teaming up to save the shark.

programme.title: E5 - Return to the Wild
programme.desc: The Eastern Cape Province is investing heavily in ecotourism and conservation as an alternative to fishing and commercial development. The region is reclaiming farmlands and closing fishing grounds for wildlife. This is one of the most exciting conservation success stories in Africa.

programme.title: Turtle Beach
programme.desc: Locals call it the ‘arribada’, or ‘arrival’. The magical days and nights when tens of thousands of sea turtles come ashore in Costa Rica, to lay millions of eggs.

programme.title: E1 - Collisions
programme.desc: Observe the natural and human forces that have shaped Ningaloo Reef, Cape Range, and Exmouth Gulf with Tim, Traditional Owners, and other experts. Check out a million-year-old fossil reef, a gargantuan fish, and a ray that packs quite a punch.

programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: Kung Fu Cult-Master
programme.desc: The film is originated from a famous Chinese Kung Fu fiction. Everybody fought for a pair of super weapons and wished to be the conqueror...

programme.title: Superstars Sunday: On The Run
programme.desc: Crack policeman Hsiang Ming is having a talk with his separated wife when a bullet from hired killer Ah Chui kills the wife, an anti-drug policewoman. Hsiang Ming goes after the killer but is told to keep off by senior officer Lu. In fact, Lu is head of a narcotics ring and lover of Hsiang Ming's ex-wife. She knows his secret, thus Lu hires Ah Chui to kill her. Then Lu sets about to kill every one connected with crime-the go-between and Ah Chui. On his death bed, the go-between tells Hsiang Ming where to find Ah Chui. This Hsiang Ming does. But Lu's men are coming to kill both of them. Hsiang Ming has to fight off the attackers. Hsiang Ming takes Ah Chui to his mother-in-law's house where Ah Chui meets Hsiang Ming's daughter and feels shameful. When Lu's men come, she saves the young girl and an injured Hsiang Ming. As Hsiang Ming's friends fail to stop Lu, Ah Chui takes Hsiang Ming to a secret hide out and nurses him. They become lovers...

programme.title: E33 - Chevilly - Chamerolles
programme.desc: Near Orleans, the Chevilly castle reveals its elegant silhouette in the natural region of Beauce. Between the Middle Ages and the Renaissance, luxurious baths and captivating fragrances... At the Chamerolles castle, history blends with the scents of the 18th century.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E16 - Yoga Ball
programme.desc: Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.title: E17 - Calypso
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends enjoy various games. Teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song... all except the mysterious Pretzel.

programme.title: E3 - Roly's First Day
programme.desc: As Roly makes his usual noise in the Clubhouse, Duggee and the Squirrels reminisce about how completely different Roly was when he first arrived.

programme.title: E5 - Go Jet Academy: Artificial Reef
programme.desc: Xuli finds a shipwreck on a coral reef and learns some glitches don't need to be fixed.

programme.title: E13 - Happy Holidays
programme.desc: Amelia has read about a certain type of jet on a book, and she shares what she learned.

programme.title: E3 - Featherwand
programme.desc: Bluey and Mum are off to Chloe's party and Bingo isn't invited. But armed with a magic featherwand that makes things incredibly heavy, Bingo can now stop them leaving the house.

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E9 - Let's Do The Tubby
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing and 'Do the Tubby!'.

programme.title: E14 - Gills
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy wants to know how his goldfish friend can stay underwater for so long. He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: E15 - Paperchase
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy has a pair of yummy green socks waiting for him. He eats one, but where is the second? He visits OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: E8 - Watch The Birdie
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programme.title: E838 - Detective Potato
programme.desc: Peppa and George are watching Detective Potato on television. When Daddy loses his car in the car park, Detective Potato appears and saves the day!

programme.title: E526 - Pups Save Ace's Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Rocky and the Pups are fixing an Old-Timey Junk Car for Ace Sorensen's Birthday!

programme.title: E220 - The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: E202 - Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: E838 - Detective Potato
programme.desc: Peppa and George are watching Detective Potato on television. When Daddy loses his car in the car park, Detective Potato appears and saves the day!

programme.title: E324 - Pups Save A Giant Plant
programme.desc: Buddy - Mayor Goodway's gesture of goodwill gift grows wildly out of control when it's planted in the wrong place. Time for a transplant!

programme.title: E113 - Crabby Boots / Papi's Picnic Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Shelly, a hermit crab missing her shell, who uses one of Boots' boots. Dora travels across the beach in search of her old shell. // Papi is having a quesadilla picnic, but he forgot the ingredients! Dora sets off to deliver them.

programme.title: E1004 - Pups Save A Windswept Polar Bear Cub / Pups Save A Drive-In
programme.desc: When a storm sends a polar bear cub to Adventure Bay, it's up to Ryder, Everest, and the pups to bring the baby bear back to its family. // The Pups must save Mayor Humdinger from a runaway movie projector at the new drive-in.

programme.title: E220 - The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.desc: Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: E202 - Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: E411 - Power Tires
programme.desc: When his tires get popped, Blaze thinks he's out of the race for good. Luckily, Gabby is there with a new set of Power Tires - high-tech wheels that can transform into anything Blaze needs to keep rolling.

programme.title: E120 - The Crew And Chase Are On The Case
programme.desc: There's a mystery afoot in Builder Cove! When the sculpture of all the townsfolk suddenly disappears, Chase joins Rubble & Crew to solve the case of the missing statue...and build a brand new Science Center to help investigate.

programme.title: E411 - Pups Save Big Hairy / Pups Save A Flying Kitty
programme.desc: Pups need to lure a big ape onto the PAW Patroller so they can take him back to the jungle. // Skye Kitty gets stuck beside an eagle's nest and needs help getting down.

programme.title: E211 - The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Ra
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: E841 - Space Adventure!
programme.desc: Peppa and George are re-enacting the Apollo Moon Landing with the help of Granny Pig's historical re-enactment society. Grampy Rabbit has lent them his rocket, but no one has told him it's just pretend.

programme.title: E843 - Mr Bull The Teacher
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle must go to the dentist so leaves the class with Mr Bull. The children already know the subjects Mr Bull suggests teaching, so he decides to show them how to fix a squeaky floorboard.

programme.title: E846 - Please And Thank You
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa talk to Peppa and George about manners. Madame Gazelle teaches all the children about how wonderful it is to say please and thank you.

programme.desc: Adventure Bay is working hard to earn the record for having the world's highest tower of pizzas!

programme.title: Taking The Lead
programme.desc: Since 2015, women in every country in the world have officially had the right to vote. It's been a long road to this point. And although today many countries are led by women, they are still underrepresented in politics and public life.

programme.title: Street Debate: Did Kaluma Boy Expose Kenya's Broken And Corrupt System?
programme.desc: In Kenya, corruption scandals and a failing health system leave families stranded. When hospitals and governments vanish, citizens turn to TikTok and civil society for help to build roads, equip schools or anything else. The story of Kaluma Boy caring for his sick father exposes a dysfunctional state and the power of online solidarity.

programme.title: Nietzsche Explained: Why A 19Th Century Rebel Feels So Gen Z
programme.desc: Nietzsche Explained: from 'God is dead” to the Ubermensch, hype culture and Kanye West. More than 125 years after his death, Friedrich Nietzsche has become a surprising icon for Gen Z and Gen Alpha. His sharp critiques of morality, religion, and society feel uncannily modern in an age of social media, burnout, and constant self-optimization.

programme.title: Street Debate: Did Kaluma Boy Expose Kenya's Broken And Corrupt System?
programme.desc: In Kenya, corruption scandals and a failing health system leave families stranded. When hospitals and governments vanish, citizens turn to TikTok and civil society for help to build roads, equip schools or anything else. The story of Kaluma Boy caring for his sick father exposes a dysfunctional state and the power of online solidarity.

programme.title: Politzek - Voices That Defy The Kremlin
programme.desc: In Russia, criticizing President Putin has become a criminal offense. Thousands have been imprisoned. Such political prisoners are called Politzek. This documentary delves deep into this system of repression and gives the Politzek a voice.

programme.title: Relative Or Foe? - Neanderthals And Us
programme.desc: Although they were physically superior to us, Neanderthals did not prevail. What made them different and why did they become extinct? How close or hostile were they to modern man?

Inertia
programme.desc: Do you ever wonder how to pull a tablecloth out from under the dishes of a set table? Host Steve Spangler shows how to do it, along with other experiments you can do at home that prove the laws of inertia. In the end, you will build your own hovercraft!

programme.title: Who's Getting Snotted?
programme.desc: There's a snot-tastic dose of Ouchology as the doctors face tough medical questions, and a VIP guest is due in the lab to help explain why DNA is a funny, twisty shape. Meanwhile, in the Emergency Department, Jan has cut his eyebrow, and Lennox has hurt his knee.

programme.title: Tough Challenges
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are facing tough challenges and unusual tasks. From swimming with critically endangered sharks to performing tricky surgery on a dog's knee, the kids are trying to prove they've got what it takes to care for unwell animals.

programme.title: Time to Say Goodbye
programme.desc: It's the last day at vet school for the Junior Vets. They faced their fears, overcame anxieties, and, most importantly, they helped all sorts of animals, pets, and critters.

programme.title: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Eric uses a hula hoop to explore nature and create a special research area teeming with life. Using the hoop helps him identify, count and keep track of the tiny creatures and plants he finds.

programme.title: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Kloe visits her family in Hungary, where she plans to find inspiration for her upcoming solo gala. Meanwhile, Josh and Ellie compete at a higher level for the first time.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Hive Got A Problem
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts follow a bee to learn why it is visiting flowers, and when the hive gets disturbed, they build a new beehive for Heni's garden.

programme.title: Shake a Tail Feather
programme.desc: Gabi can't decide which animal impression to do for the annual talent show. Anabella suggests she dance like a ‘Bird of Paradise' and Gabi is intrigued. Why would a bird dance? To find out and get a video of the rarely-seen dance, the team flies to New Guinea.

programme.title: Plastic Cups
programme.desc: What could we make with a paper cup? Let's find out.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Day of the Time Machine
programme.desc: Ricky plays with a time machine app and wishes he could go back in time after spilling paint on a priceless rug. He meets Gaudi to make a salt dough lizard and also learns how to create wings for his shoes.

programme.title: Wrist Concert Lights
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents wristband lights and a multifunction travel jacket with a pocket for everything. She visits a Girls App Camp teaching tech and meets the inventor of an easy way to check for a sore throat.

programme.title: Correcting Color Blindness
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents glasses that allow the colour blind to see colours and the teen inventors making driving safer with their Smart Steering Wheel. She investigates 3D clothes printing and discovers a movie actress who invented a new way of communication.

programme.title: Brave Orangutan
programme.desc: Someone is destroying large areas of the local jungle in Borneo, chasing away a group of orangutans from their natural habitat. One very brave orangutan is trying to fight against the bulldozers. But he won't last long without the MeteoHeroes' help!

programme.title: Cat Toy
programme.desc: OEistein makes a cardboard cat toy.

programme.title: Mystery at Cinderella Castle
programme.desc: Rose enjoys her fairy tale life but dislikes returning to Earth. When Vicky's plan backfires and the Gate to Earth closes, Granny Cinderella invites Rose, Joy, and Astoria for a sleepover at her castle. They must solve the mystery of Granny's stolen shoes before dawn.

programme.title: Banquet
programme.desc: Howler and Dove are invited to Lord Roach's banquet. But banquets come with all kinds of rules and regulations, exposing the greedier guests in the room! Hardened foodies, they indulge in all kinds of scheming.

programme.title: Wizard School
programme.desc: Robbie and Carol are kept back after school, and alone in the classroom, come across a couple of ancient spell books. An epic battle of magic begins.

programme.title: Jesters
programme.desc: Lord Roach is feeling really down! His wife Geraldine goes out of her way to entertain him, bringing in acrobats, musicians, etc. But it's no good. Enter Little Lewis, dressed in his court jester costume and Lord Roach is very happy.

programme.title: Refuse to Mow
programme.desc: It's summer, and the Grimwades are enjoying being outside. Daddy wants to mow the lawn but the family protests as they don't want him to cut the rest of the daisies. This leads them to question why Daddy has to cut the lawn at all.

programme.title: Snowball
programme.desc: Vik is annoyed when the snowy weather disrupts his baseball game. But Yoko makes a field of magical snowmen and the game is enjoyed by all!

programme.title: Marble Maze
programme.desc: How do you make a marble-ous maze? We'll show you step by step, so you don't get lost.

programme.title: Your Heartbeat
programme.desc: The doctors super-size the heart to investigate the piece of body kit that makes it beat. We meet a Brilliant Body para-cyclist who uses brain power to cycle faster. Meanwhile, Connie comes in with a shaky leg, and Marley has a toothpick stuck in his foot!

programme.title: Oops, I Forted!
programme.desc: Do you want to know how you can build a really big fort? In this episode Eric reveals an exciting trick. The ingredients? A lot of cushions and the mathematical 'perimeter'. So gather your pillows and get ready for some fort action!

programme.title: Breaking Free
programme.desc: Joe, Olly, and Oscar got inspired by the gym vloggers and decided to create their own Free-G video to post online. Madi has many challenges to overcome as she sets off for her first British Gymnastics residential training camp.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: 3Pol Trobol: Huli Ka Balbon![Live]
programme.desc: Apollo “Pol” Balbon, an aide-de‑camp, is framed for the murder of his boss, the Executive Director of the National Defense Agency. Forced to flee, he seeks the help of the director's daughter, Trina, even disguising himself in drag to gain her trust. Together, they uncover a conspiracy involving powerful corrupt officials while being pursued by law enforcement now under their control.

programme.title: Darna
programme.desc: Narda, a typical schoolgirl, learns that her mother is the protector of a mighty stone. She takes up the mantle and transforms into Darna, a superhero dedicated to battling evil forces on Earth.

programme.title: 3Pol Trobol: Huli Ka Balbon![Live]

programme.title: Pamilya Talk With Tita Jing S6
programme.desc: Be inspired and learn new things with Tita Jing as she talks about family and life

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: My Puhunan: Kaya Mo!
programme.desc: a magazine program that will be the primary source of information, inspiration, and motivation for Filipinos to change their mindset and be the best version of themselves in order to achieve success in life.

programme.title: Bro. Eddie Classics
programme.desc: the flagship TV program of the Jesus Is Lord Church, is dedicated to fulfil its mandate of bringing all peoples to the Kingdom of the Living God through the saving, healing, delivering and transforming power of the Lord Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Chef Rv's Kitchen S20
programme.desc: Chef RV Manabat is a Chef Restaurateur and an award-winning cookbook author from Binan City, Philippines. He runs a boutique Baking and Culinary School.

programme.title: E59 - The Return/The Nemesis/The Crew/The Others/The Signature
programme.desc: Dad has to make the kids on time for their first day back at school. But he's overslept and now he can't find Gumball, Darwin or Anais anywhere. He sets about retracing his steps from the day before, to work out where they might be. When he finally figures out where they are, it's a race against time to rescue them and prove to himself - and Mum - that he's not a bad father.

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E13 - Siblings Month: Helping Out!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month by helping out! First, JJ assumes the role of a pretend doctor, taking care of TomTom & YoYo with a checkup & lollipops. Then, the siblings team up with Daddy to bake a special cake for Mom! The helpfulness continues as they wash a dirty car together after a soccer game & TomTom helps JJ learn to use the potty. Plus, join the family on a nature walk with Bingo to learn about animals & nature!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E2 - When Cute Creatures Cause Big Chaos!
programme.desc: Watch out, because these cute creatures are causing big chaos! First, Chroma the Magic Pet has a cold, & every time she sneezes, she causes a huge color splat! Mila & Morphle must find her before the whole city is covered in color. Then, the Baby Morphles arrive from another dimension & they are in the mood for a game of chase! From a giant living doll to a runaway magic pet, these cute creatures are causing chaos everywhere!

programme.title: E7 - JJ's Big Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a big animal adventure with JJ! The fun starts on Grandpa's farm, where JJ learns all about the animals & the sounds they make. He even helps give a sheep a bath! Then, it's time to head to the ocean. Join JJ & his family as they visit an aquarium & sing 'Baby Shark' with a real shark family! The adventure gets prehistoric when Ms. Appleberry teaches the class all about their favorite dinosaurs. From guessing games to meeting Bingo the dog, it's a wild day!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E3 - Siblings Month: Family Adventures
programme.desc: Join Nina & her familia for some sibling adventures! First, Lucy, Nina & Mateo visit a petting zoo to dance with baby animals. Then, the siblings dream of soaring through the sky like their pilot dad during a trip to the park! The family fun continues with a soccer game challenge, a bath time competition & a quest to help the magical Star Star get back to the sky. It's a month of family love & adventure!

programme.title: E13 - Siblings Month: Helping Out!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month by helping out! First, JJ assumes the role of a pretend doctor, taking care of TomTom & YoYo with a checkup & lollipops. Then, the siblings team up with Daddy to bake a special cake for Mom! The helpfulness continues as they wash a dirty car together after a soccer game & TomTom helps JJ learn to use the potty. Plus, join the family on a nature walk with Bingo to learn about animals & nature!

programme.title: E14 - Siblings Month: Growing Up Together!
programme.desc: JJ is growing up with his siblings! First, JJ, YoYo & TomTom learn the value of saving money in their piggy bank. Then, when the lights go out, Daddy helps them make shadow animals with flashlights! The growing up continues as TomTom loses his first tooth & JJ gets his very first big kid bed! From playing indoor games on a rainy day to learning healthy habits, it's a month of growing & learning together.

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E12 - Spy Games
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: E11 - Family Secrets
programme.desc: Danny and Lena race to stop a string of violent crimes before the situation spirals out of control, while Sarah's plans for a family outing take an unexpected turn. At the same time, Jonah and Sean chase a case with surprising twists, and Mae receives an invitation that could change everything.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Dominion
programme.desc: With Earth once again dominated by prehistoric predators, two generations of heroes must unite for a globe-spanning adventure to shape the destiny of humans and dinosaurs.

programme.title: E11 - Family Secrets
programme.desc: Danny and Lena race to stop a string of violent crimes before the situation spirals out of control, while Sarah's plans for a family outing take an unexpected turn. At the same time, Jonah and Sean chase a case with surprising twists, and Mae receives an invitation that could change everything.

programme.title: E3 - Chain Reaction
programme.desc: During a routine interview at a chemical plant, Tess and Leo are trapped by a gunman looking to kill the plant's manager. Tess and Leo's attempt to evacuate the target and other workers safely is cut short when Leo is shot and injured, leaving Tess and Sunny to outsmart the gunman, escape the lockdown, and save the day. With unexpected help from Matt and Mia, Sunny guides Tess around the highly flammable plant to save Leo's life and uncover the gunman's motive before he blows them all up. Tess and Sunny are both blindsided by unsettling news as Lucas shares plans to get married, and Sunny finally uncovers Rigby's secret.

programme.desc: 謝盈萱等原班人馬回歸出演，天心加盟飾演新角色。 40歲的陳嘉玲從天龍國回到家鄉台南，展開人生下半場。第一件要努力的事就是靠自己的雙手，把買下的鬼屋變成家。但一開始就發生一連串意外，摔傷、被蜜蜂叮，還坐輪椅進了醫院……新的一季看陳嘉玲如何用盡全力，開始書寫另一段人生篇章。

programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger stars as tough detective John Kimble in Kindergarten Cop, going undercover as a teacher to find a drug lord's wife. Packed with action, humor, and heart, it's a classic comedy-thriller.

E13
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's masterpiece follows a team of scientists on an island to witness real dinosaurs in a park, only to see everything go wrong when a storm hits.

programme.desc: When things are no longer what they used to be, a former prom queen and her friend realise that it is time for them to grow up.

programme.desc: A stuntman working a movie production is hired to find the missing lead actor, instead, he gets framed for a murder.

programme.title: Are You Lonesome Tonight?
programme.desc: On a dark night, Xueming hits a pedestrian with his car and flees the scene. Desperate to escape his feelings of guilt, he decides to approach the dead man's wife, Mrs Liang. Meanwhile, the body is discovered - riddled with bullets. Chen, the detective in charge of the investigation, becomes obsessed with the case. Years later, all three remain caught in a tangled web of memories and lies, desperately searching for a truth that refuses to be revealed...

programme.title: BODIES AT REST
programme.desc: A cat-and-mouse game unfolds over a single night when three armed criminals barge into a morgue, demanding the forensic doctor and his assistant to hand over a bullet lodged inside a corpse. While the criminals are in a desperate attempt to hide their true identities, the doctor finds himself sinking deeper and deeper into a quagmire as his past inadvertently catches up with him. Each explosive twist soon pushes the characters beyond their limits.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious
programme.desc: The Fast And The Furious is pure faced paced adrenaline-fuelled car action. A rookie cop goes undercover, posing as a racing team member to investigate a series of hijackings.

programme.title: Pocketful Of Miracles
programme.desc: A gangster from New York and his girlfriend decide to help an apple vendor who is distressed because her daughter is set to marry the son of a count assuming that she is rich.
